attacking_style: Pure sprinter who does not initiate attacks. Relies entirely on positioning in reduced bunch sprints in final meters, not on pre-emptive moves.
team_tactics: Limited tactical data available. Appears to work with reduced team support compared to top-tier lead-out trains, evidenced by sprint positioning battles rather than organized lead-outs.
terrain_preference: Reduced bunch sprints after selective stages where attrition has removed pure fast-twitch sprinters. Struggles against organized sprint trains with full lead-out support.
vulnerability: Lacks the final kick to convert strong positioning into victories against top-tier sprinters like Viviani. Vulnerable when facing fully organized lead-out trains.
key_patterns: Consistently finishes second in Giro sprints, showing strong positioning but lacking winning speed (2 occurrences)
Performs better in reduced bunch sprints rather than full field gallops with organized trains
Demonstrates positioning discipline to stay competitive through technical/selective finales at Grand Tours
form_trajectory: neutral: consistent second-place finishes across 2017-2018 Giro suggest stable level but plateau below victory threshold
